tools.name: check_verification_debt
tools.description: Estimate a software team's verification debt from team parameters. Computes the four published metrics (generation-to-verification ratio, review depth, unverified-merge rate, two-week churn) and an annual cost estimate, with the full calculation path, labeled assumptions, thresholds, and sources (Gi

tools.name: lint_task_spec
tools.description: Check whether a free-text work order for an AI coding agent is verifiable BEFORE handing it over. Heuristic, deterministic lint of the task's form against the four building blocks of a checkable task (goal, boundaries, acceptance criteria, validation plan) plus rule checks (vague adjectives without

tools.name: get_task_contract_template
tools.description: Returns Reality Graph's free fill-in template (v0) for a verifiable task contract: goal, non-goals, boundaries (may change / must not change / forbidden), 3-7 yes/no acceptance criteria, validation plan, expected evidence, assumptions, open questions — with a filled example and fill-in guidance. Wri

tools.name: validate_task_contract
tools.description: Deterministically validates a FILLED task contract (the JSON structure from get_task_contract_template): completeness of goal/non-goals/boundaries, decidability of each acceptance criterion (vague words, missing measurable markers), automated checks in the validation plan, expected evidence, and lef

tools.name: get_verification_report_template
tools.description: Returns the free fill-in template (v0) for a verification report — the artifact you write right after an AI-assisted run: task recap, files changed AND files confirmed untouched, validation results per acceptance criterion (not authored by the generating model), what was skipped, limitations, and th

tools.name: search
tools.description: Full-text search over the Reality Graph knowledge base on AI coding verification: 40+ glossary definitions, 700+ FAQ answers, sourced statistics, and article summaries on verification debt, AI code review, spec-vs-implementation checking, EU compliance (EU AI Act, GDPR, NIS2), and AI coding governan

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Fetch a document from the Reality Graph knowledge base by id (as returned by search, e.g. '/verification-debt') or by full realitygraph.dev URL. Returns the document's summary, definitions, key facts, FAQ, and sources as text, plus the canonical URL.

tools.name: article_summary
tools.description: Compact summary of one published Reality Graph article from the public manifest index: key, locale, completeness, canonical and alternate-locale path, title, description, category, archetype, intent, cluster, and publish/modified dates. Read-only and deterministic. Unknown articles return found:fals

tools.name: article_metadata
tools.description: Full public metadata block for one article and locale: title, description, category, archetype, intent, cluster, published and modified dates, eligible schema types, and image key. Read-only, deterministic, allowlist-only. Unknown articles return found:false.

tools.name: article_sections
tools.description: Stable section outline for one article and locale: for each section its id (anchor), label, the module it renders, and its schema contributions. `available` is false when the article is at the catalog stage and carries no sections yet. Read-only and deterministic.

tools.name: article_section
tools.description: Return a single section of an article by its stable anchor id. On an unknown anchor, returns found:false together with knownAnchors so a caller can correct the request. Read-only and deterministic.

tools.name: article_sources
tools.description: Report the sources-block capability state for one article and locale (present, eligible, or unknown). The public index carries the capability state, not the source rows, so `available` reflects whether a sources block is published. Read-only and deterministic.

tools.name: article_matrix
tools.description: Return the module/matrix capability set for one article and locale: present and eligible modules plus the per-surface capability states (answer capsule, faq, sources, comparison, table, diagram, product fit). Read-only and deterministic.

tools.name: article_related
tools.description: Return the semantic relation graph for one article and locale: cornerstone flag, supporting-for, prerequisites, next steps, comparison peers, related articles, product journey, and editorial related. Every value is a canonical path into the same catalog. Read-only and deterministic.

tools.name: article_cluster
tools.description: List the articles in a topic cluster. Called without a cluster, it returns the full sorted list of cluster ids (with an empty member list) so a caller can discover them. Called with a cluster id, it returns that cluster's members (key, locale, canonical path, title). Read-only and deterministic.

tools.name: article_locale
tools.description: Return the locale pairing for one article: whether the EN/DE pair is complete, and each present slot's canonical path and its alternate-locale path. Read-only and deterministic.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "fetch" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: check_verification_debt, search, fetch · Private data: lint_task_spec, get_verification_report_template, search, fetch · Public sink: article_summary · Destructive: get_task_contract_template, get_verification_report_template.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: check_verification_debt, search, fetch · Private data: lint_task_spec, get_verification_report_template, search, fetch · Public sink: article_summary · Destructive: get_task_contract_template, get_verification_report_template

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

title: Tool removed since last scan
detail: Tool "article_locale" is no longer advertised. Removal can precede a shadowing replacement from another server.
